tasks.label: npm: build
tasks.detail: next build + postbuild (copy-standalone-assets: flatten server.js + static/public). Required before Electron can start the embedded Next server.

tasks.label: desktop: prepare
tasks.detail: Build Next standalone (incl. postbuild flatten) then compile Electron main. Run this before launching Electron if you skip the full desktop:dev script.

tasks.label: npm: desktop:dev
tasks.detail: Full pipeline: build → electron:compile → electron . (same as package.json desktop:dev).

tasks.label: npm: desktop:demo
tasks.detail: Full pipeline with simulated drones: build → electron:compile → electron . --demo
